docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY SIF, MEHDI AS TO DEFENDANT SHORT, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT SHORT, STEVEN
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SIF, MEHDI SHORT, STEVEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIF, MEHDI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHORT, STEVEN $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.00, THE HOA'S OPERATING BUDGET SHOULD HAVE BEEN MAINTAINED AND MUST BE RESTORED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) NICHOLAS MONSMA. FILED BY DEFENDANT SHORT, STEVEN
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT SHORT, STEVEN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHORT, STEVEN
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF MEHDI SIF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEVEN SHORT IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM WITH NICHOLAS MONSMA APPEARED ON THE SAME SCREEN ASSISTING WITH REPRESENTATION DUE TO MR. SHORT'S MEDICAL CONDITION. DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
